english: Waw — “Nail / Hook” — sound: w / o / u

hebrew: שְׁמַע יִשְׂרָאֵל יהוה אֱלֹהֵינוּ יהוה אֶחָד
transliteration: Shema Yisrael YAHOWAH Eloheinu YAHOWAH ekhad

hebrew: וְאָהַבְתָּ אֵת יהוה אֱלֹהֶיךָ בְּכָל־לְבָבְךָ וּבְכָל־נַפְשְׁךָ וּבְכָל־מְאֹדֶךָ
transliteration: w'ahavta et YAHOWAH Eloheka b'kol l'vavka uv'kol nafsheka uv'kol me'odeka

hebrew: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יהוה אֱלֹהֵינוּ מֶלֶךְ הָעוֹלָם הַמּוֹצִיא לֶחֶם מִן הָאָרֶץ
transliteration: Baruk atah YAHOWAH Eloheinu Melek ha'olam, hamotzi lekhem min ha'aretz

hebrew: בְּרֵאשִׁית בָּרָא אֱלֹהִים אֵת הַשָּׁמַיִם וְאֵת הָאָרֶץ
english: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth. (Genesis 1:1)

hebrew: שְׁמַע יִשְׂרָאֵל יהוה אֱלֹהֵינוּ יהוה אֶחָד
english: Hear, O Israel: YAHOWAH our God, YAHOWAH is one. (Deuteronomy 6:4)
YAHOWAH is my shepherd; I shall not want. (Psalm 23:1)
The Spirit of the Lord YAHOWAH is upon me. (Isaiah 61:1)
Trust in YAHOWAH with all your heart. (Proverbs 3:5)
Your word is a lamp to my feet. (Psalm 119:105)
